'''Hakin''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Alderaanian/Legends|native]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. A [[Skiff/Legends|skiff]] racer, Hakin had learned to bargain on the [[Black market/Legends|black market]] and later joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]—which valued his black market bargaining skill—shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. That year, Hakin, who had by then become a [[Corporal/Legends|corporal]], was stationed aboard the Rebel [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']] during its [[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|attack]] by the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Devastator/Legends|''Devastator'']].

==Biography==
Hakin, a [[Human/Legends|Human]],<ref name="JKTCG" /> was a native of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] and a [[Skiff/Legends|skiff]] racer who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="CSWE" /> He<ref name="JKTCG" /> joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]<ref name="CSWE" /> in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the [[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tatooine]] to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].</ref> eventually becoming a [[Corporal/Legends|corporal]].<ref name="JKTCG" /> That year,<ref name="NEC" /> Hakin was among the [[Rebel trooper/Legends|Rebel troopers]] stationed aboard<ref name="CSWE" /> the [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanian]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa's]]<ref name="ANH">{{Film|IV}}</ref> [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]], the [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']].<ref name="CSWE" /> Rebel [[Spy/Legends|spies]] transmitted the [[Battle of Toprawa|stolen]] [[Death Star plans/Legends|plans]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|DS-1 Orbital Battle Station]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] to the [[Starship/Legends|vessel]], leading to its pursuit and [[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|overtaking]] by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] personal [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Devastator/Legends|''Devastator'']]. The Rebel [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] unsuccessfully attempted to defend the ship from the invading [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]].<ref name="ANH" />

==Personality and traits==
Hakin had light skin, [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]], and blue [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. He sported a thin mustache.<ref name="JKTCG" /> 

==Skills and abilities==
Due to his skiff-racing experience, Hakin knew how to bargain on the [[Black market/Legends|black market]], a skill valued by the Rebel Alliance.<ref name="JKTCG" />

==Equipment==
Hakin wore the standard [[Alliance Fleet trooper uniform|uniform]] for Alliance [[Fleet/Legends|Fleet]] [[Troop/Legends|troopers]] and was armed with a [[DH-17 blaster pistol/Legends|DH-17 blaster pistol]].<ref name="JKTCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Hakin was created by [[Decipher]]'s [[2001]] [[Premiere (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Premiere'']] set of the ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]''.<ref name="JKTCG" />
